summary: Massive v1.3.0 session: SKILL.md boot loader (1250→51 lines), CLI-driven context delivery, pre-game verify chain, CSS variable audit (~500 replacements), tag module activate command, playtest-driven fixes for sendPrompt fallback, script chaining, and character creation proficiency locking. 1,087 tests passing across 60 files. Three successful playtests on Claude.ai with progressive bug fixing.

tasks.description: SKILL.md gutted to 51-line boot loader, tag help command with new-game/scene subcommands, inline guidance in sync
Panel styling investigation — CDN works, bugs were class/ID mismatch + wrong variable names
svgGuidance in render output, SVG examples in style-reference.md
~500 --color-* → --sta-* replacements across templates, style-reference.md, station.md, brutalist.md
tag verify scenario|rules|character gates, render refuses without prior verify marker
tag module activate/activate-tier/status — mechanical module loading with content delivery, _modulesRead state field, compaction reset
Dual-action on every click: clipboard copy + sendPrompt. Button shows Copied! if sendPrompt unavailable
CDN scripts load sequentially via onload chain — fixes audio Play button race condition
toStringArray extracts id/label from objects, Tier 1 modules pre-selected+disabled in settings grid
Character creation locks archetype proficiencies in grid, player picks 2 additional
craftGuidance.compositionNotes in render output — tells GM to use plain quotes not escaped
Replace plain text HP/XP with SVG pips in status bar and character panel. Add renderPips() shared function + verify gate.
tag render scene should refuse if Tier 1 modules not in _modulesRead
Update SKILL.md and tag help new-game to reference tag module activate-tier instead of file reads
Deep dive to find other enforcement language that could be mechanical gates
From UI/UX audit: toast DOM leak (CDN JS), dialogue sendPrompt fallback, ship badge contrast, fieldset/legend for settings groups

next_steps: SVG pips for HP/XP — create renderPips() shared function in cli/render/lib/, update character.ts and scene.ts status bar, add verify gate rejecting plain-text HP/XP displays
Add render gate for _modulesRead — tag render scene refuses if Tier 1 modules not in _modulesRead state field
Update SKILL.md and tag help new-game to reference tag module activate-tier 1 instead of manual file reads
Split render.spec.ts (963 lines) before it hits the 1000-line edit block — extract by feature area

context.architecture_notes: CDN CSS loads correctly in Claude.ai (not blocked by CSP — earlier diagnosis was wrong). Monospace-only rendering was caused by .narrative class/ID mismatch + unprefixed --color-* CSS variables. All templates now use --sta-* with hardcoded fallbacks. Pre-game verify chain: scenario→settings→character→scene, each gate writes a signed marker file. tag module activate delivers module content mechanically as command output — replaces broken pattern where modulesActive was set but modules never read. _modulesRead tracks which modules GM has actually loaded; resets on compaction.
context.test_results: 1,087 tests passing across 60 files (up from 1,034 at session start). Zero failures.
context.known_limitations: CSS bar containers (.char-bar-container, .bar-fill-hp) render invisible because CDN CSS panel classes exist but depend on correct cache version. SVG pips would be CDN-independent and more reliable. Settings template still shows generic options (easy/normal/hard) when GM passes custom objects — toStringArray extracts id but labels aren't used for display text yet. verify.spec.ts at 508 lines and render.spec.ts at 963 lines — both approaching 1000-line edit block limit, need splitting.
files_modified: SKILL.md — 1250→51 lines boot loader with correct setup path
cli/commands/help.ts — new tag help command with new-game/scene subcommands
cli/commands/verify.ts — pre-game widget verify, CSS variable check, Tier 1 enforcement, footer exclusion, archetype name check
cli/commands/render.ts — [object Object] detection, pre-game verify gate, svgGuidance, compositionNotes
cli/render/templates/scene.ts — narrative class fix, --sta-* vars, atmo-pill fix, inline CSS fallbacks
cli/render/templates/settings.ts — object extraction, Tier 1 auto-include+disabled, DEFAULT_MODULES includes all Tier 1
cli/render/lib/shadow-wrapper.ts — sequential script chaining, JS cache busting
assets/js/tag-scene.js — sendPrompt clipboard fallback, sequential load chaining
styles/style-reference.md — SVG diagram examples, --sta-* variable fixes
context.gotchas: CDN CSS IS loading (not CSP blocked). jsdelivr caches aggressively — JS URLs now have ?v=hash but old rendered HTML still references old hashes. The tag build-css regenerates station.css from style .md sources — editing station.css directly gets overwritten. verify.spec.ts is at 508 lines and render.spec.ts at 963 — cannot add many more tests to render.spec without splitting. Pre-game verify markers (.verified-scenario etc) must be written in test beforeEach blocks or render tests fail.
